import "./App.css" import React, { useState } from "react"; function App() { const [cart, setCart] = useState([]); const products = [ { id: 1, name: "20*5", grade:"N-35", Image:"https://r.search.yahoo.com/_ylt=AwrKGERVdSpqtt0gJZjGHAx.;_ylu=c2VjA2ZwLWF0dHJpYgRzbGsDcnVybA--/RV=2/RE=1781196245/RO=11/RU=https%3a%2f%2fwww.tinytronics.nl%2fnl%2fgereedschap-en-montage%2finstallatie-en-montagemateriaal%2fmagneten%2fxmp-neodymium-magneet-20x5-n35/RK=2/RS=ASw5zZKRKM5cyY1uB9MCMSjHYP4-", price: "500" }, { id: 2, name: "10*2", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, { id: 3, name: "10*10*2", grade:"N-35", price: 250 }, { id: 4, name: "5*3", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, { id: 5, name: "6*3", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, { id: 6, name: "40*10*5", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, { id: 7, name: "40*20*5", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, { id: 8, name: "25*5", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, { id: 9, name: "25*25", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, { id: 10, name: "5*1", grade:"N-35", price: 100 }, ]; const addToCart = (product) => { setCart([...cart, product]); }; return (

TEX

Cart Items: {cart.length}

{products.map((product) => (

{product.name}

{product.grade}

₹{product.price}

))}
); } export default App;
